isolation: M2=0,M4=0,aeration=0; M3 on vs off; 3-9 kHz envelope demod
interpretation: Dominant 1x rotational line at 21.3 Hz with a 2x harmonic = mass imbalance from a broken/missing fan blade (once-per-rev heavy spot). 21.3 Hz (~1280 rpm) does not match a clean 50 Hz sub-multiple (25/16.7 Hz), so the impeller likely runs at its own (geared/independent) speed rather than line-locked.
